content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

July 14, 2006

Christopher J. Raymer
Treasurer
1512 Tanglewood Drive
San Luis Obispo, CA 93401

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-06-125

Dear Mr. Rayer:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn your June 23, 2006, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act.1 As we discussed during our phone conversation prior to June 30, 2006, you were able to satisfy your concerns after reading the Kaufman Advice Letter No. A-06-110, that we faxed to you. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

If I may be of any further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Lawrence T. Woodlock
Senior Counsel
Legal Division

LW:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\06-125

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
